critique:
Critique:
Step 1 is incorrect. The question requires identifying and counting rows where country = "united states." Using f_select_column(*) merely retains all columns without narrowing to the relevant "country" column or filtering rows. Moreover, the label "[MUTATED from group_column]" suggests the intended operation was to group or at least select the "country" column to facilitate counting, which was not done. A correct approach would use f_select_row(country = "united states") or f_select_column(country) followed by grouping/counting.
